title: Specification of Futures: Which of the following describes the difference between a long...
summary: Distinguish long and short positions in futures based on buy and sell obligations.
prompt: Which of the following describes the difference between a long and short position in a futures contract?

options.text: One plaintiff's proof suffices for all
In a futures contract, a long position signifies that a trader has agreed to
Difference between spot and futures prices

solution: In a futures contract, a long position signifies that a trader has agreed to buy the asset at a specified price in the future, while a short position indicates that the trader has agreed to sell the asset. This distinction is key to understanding futures trading.
